---
title: leonhard volz
about: 
    id: hero-heading
    template: jolla
    image: assets/profile.jpg
    links:
      - icon: github
        text: Github
        href: https://github.com/levolz
      - icon: linkedin
        text: LinkedIn
        href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/leonhard-volz-9b8a1a1b2/
      - text: "{{< iconify fa6-brands:google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
        href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IRM3zPcAAAAJ
---
:::{#hero-heading}
Leonhard Volz is a data manager at the University of Tilburg on the Vidi-project on machine learning-informed theory construction in social science, as part of the [INSIGHT lab](https://cjvanlissa.github.io/insight_lab) under the auspices of [Caspar van Lissa](https://cjvanlissa.github.io/).

Previously part of the [Theory Methods Lab](https://www.theorymethodslab.com/) and the [AMPL Lab](https://www.ampl-psych.com/) at the University of Amsterdam, and the [Educational Psychology Group](https://bildung-psy.univie.ac.at/en/) at the University of Vienna. 
My research focuses on the development and application of methods for formalizing theories in the social sciences (and psychology in particular), and meta-scientific questions related to their use in research practice. 

{{< iconify pepicons-pop:pen-circle-filled >}}  Currently working on developing and benchmarking causal discovery algorithms for partially automated theory construction and a community database of formalized theories in the social sciences.

:::

# resume

## education
Research Master (Psychology) | University of Amsterdam | 2025

Bachelor (Psychology) | University of Vienna | 2020

## experience
Data Manager | University of Tilburg | 2025 - present

Research & Teaching Assistant | University of Amsterdam | 2020 - 2025

Student Assistant | University of Vienna | 2018 - 2020

## skills
Statistical Analysis | R, Python

Data Management | SQL, Git

Web Development | HTML, CSS, JavaScript
